title: hieracium jurassicum subsp. hemiplecum
intro: Hieracium jurassicum subsp. hemiplecum is a lesser-known subspecies of the Hieracium jurassicum plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hieracium jurassicum subsp. hemiplecum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
